While driving on highways using cruise control and adaptive cruise control the vehicle decelerates without driver input. The system also misreads or fails to update speed limit signs causing incorrect cruise speeds and sudden speed changes.  This behavior has occurred repeatedly

narrative.headline: What 2023 Mercedes-Benz S-Class owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 12 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Forward Collision Avoidance (42% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
